---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

What user or developer problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Scope

- [ ] Rust core/runtime
- [ ] TUI
- [ ] GUI / Tauri / Vue
- [ ] Tooling / CI / docs

## Additional context

Links, sketches, screenshots, or examples from similar tools.
